x-enumeration-literals.name: Strategic Alliances
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Long-term collaborations where both parties work closely to achieve shared business goals without forming a new legal entity.

Comment:
Example: A bank partnering with a fintech to enhance digital lending capabilities.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Joint Ventures
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Two or more organizations create a new, jointly owned entity to pursue a specific business opportunity.

Comment:
Shared ownership
Shared risk and profits

x-enumeration-literals.name: Bancassurance Partnerships
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Banks partner with insurance companies to sell insurance products through bank branches or digital platforms.

Comment:
Cross-selling financial products
Commission or revenue-sharing model

x-enumeration-literals.name: Referral Partnerships
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The bank refers customers to a partner (or vice versa) and earns a referral fee.

Comment:
Transaction-based relationship

x-enumeration-literals.name: Outsourcing Partnerships
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Banks outsource specific functions (IT, call centers, payment processing) to third-party providers.

Comment:
Operational focus

x-enumeration-literals.name: Co-Branding Partnerships
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Banks collaborate with retail brands or organizations to issue co-branded credit or debit cards.

Comment:
Shared branding
Revenue-sharing
Marketing collaboration

x-enumeration-literals.name: Embedded Finance Partnerships
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Banks integrate financial services into non-bank platforms (e.g., e-commerce, ride-sharing apps).

Comment:
API-based integration
Technology-driven

x-enumeration-literals.name: Correspondent Banking Relationships
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Banks partner with other banks (often internationally) to provide services where they do not have a physical presence.

Comment:
Cross-border transaction
Trade finance support
International settlement services
